hooks.command: git fetch origin master --quiet 2>/dev/null; B=$(git symbolic-ref --short -q HEAD); if [ "$B" = master ]; then if git diff --quiet && git diff --cached --quiet; then if git merge --ff-only origin/master --quiet 2>/dev/null; then echo "[PreEdit] ff a origin/master ($(git rev-parse --short HEAD))"; else echo "[PreEdit] master diverge da origin/master: nessun allineamento (risolvi a mano)"; fi; else echo "[PreEdit] modifiche locali non committate: allineamento saltato (nessun reset)"; fi; else echo "[PreEdit] su branch '$B' (non master): nessun allineamento automatico a master"; fi

IN=$(cat); case "$IN" in *"git commit"*) BADGE=$(grep -oE 'version-badge">v[0-9.]+' arda/top/index.html 2>/dev/null | head -1 | sed 's/.*v//'); DV=$(grep -oE 'datiVersion = "[0-9.]+' arda/top/dati.js 2>/dev/null | head -1 | sed 's/.*"//'); if [ -n "$BADGE" ] && [ -n "$DV" ] && [ "$BADGE" != "$DV" ]; then echo "Commit bloccato: versione disallineata, badge v$BADGE != datiVersion $DV (fonte unica: dati.js). Allinea i due numeri prima di committare." >&2; exit 2; fi ;; esac

IN=$(cat); case "$IN" in *"git commit"*) git fetch origin master --quiet 2>/dev/null; BEHIND=$(git rev-list --count HEAD..origin/master 2>/dev/null); if [ "${BEHIND:-0}" -gt 0 ]; then echo "Commit bloccato: $BEHIND commit dietro origin/master (probabile salvataggio admin su dati.js). Riallinea a origin/master e riapplica prima di committare." >&2; exit 2; fi ;; esac

git fetch origin master --quiet 2>/dev/null; B=$(git symbolic-ref --short -q HEAD); if [ "$B" = master ] && git diff --quiet && git diff --cached --quiet; then git merge --ff-only origin/master --quiet 2>/dev/null && echo "[SessionStart] ff a origin/master ($(git rev-parse --short HEAD))" || echo "[SessionStart] master diverge o ff impossibile: ref aggiornati, nessun reset"; else echo "[SessionStart] no auto-align (branch '$B' o modifiche locali): ref remoti aggiornati"; fi

BADGE=$(grep -oE 'version-badge">v[0-9.]+' arda/top/index.html 2>/dev/null | head -1 | sed 's/.*v//'); DV=$(grep -oE 'datiVersion = "[0-9.]+' arda/top/dati.js 2>/dev/null | head -1 | sed 's/.*"//'); if [ -n "$BADGE" ] && [ -n "$DV" ] && [ "$BADGE" != "$DV" ]; then echo "[SessionStart] versione disallineata: badge v$BADGE != datiVersion $DV (fonte unica: dati.js). Allinea prima di committare."; fi

git fetch origin master --quiet 2>/dev/null; B=$(git symbolic-ref --short -q HEAD); BEHIND=$(git rev-list --count HEAD..origin/master 2>/dev/null); AHEAD=$(git rev-list --count origin/master..HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "${BEHIND:-0}" -gt 0 ]; then if [ "${AHEAD:-0}" = 0 ] && git diff --quiet && git diff --cached --quiet; then git reset --hard origin/master 2>/dev/null && echo "[turn] branch '$B' riallineato a origin/master ($(git rev-parse --short HEAD)): $BEHIND commit recuperati (probabile salvataggio admin)."; else echo "[turn] ATTENZIONE: $BEHIND commit dietro origin/master (ahead=$AHEAD o modifiche locali): riallinea a mano prima di lavorare su dati.js."; fi; fi
